rationale: Fresh source-only validation passes. Prior fail is fixed: src/application/gc.ts now parses runtime handoff JSON and only treats codewiki_session_handoff statuses completed/cancelled/external/failed as purgeable; queued/started/unknown active handoffs are not candidates. tests/smoke/hot-retention.test.mjs and an independent temp probe prove queued/started handoffs are absent from dry-run and survive runtime purge, while completed and legacy runtime handoffs remain purgeable. Existing tracked GC archive-proof/restore-ledger behavior still blocks without archive_sha/tree_sha, rejects tree mismatch, writes a restore ledger before tracked deletion, and retains restore commands. Skill assets enforce post-commit GC, no pre-commit tracked purge, and GC ledger is not validation/content proof; Pi registration exposes codewiki_gc with typed schema; session-handoff context-reset tool path remains visible by staging and returning /wiki-session-handoff instead of compacting from tool context. All validation checks passed; audit warnings are non-blocking generated-view/publication hygiene, not implementation defects. Policy blocks implementation validation until audit:alignment, audit:changed, audit:task, audit:stale-reference, audit:file-structure are recorded.
checks: Read source refs only: .codewiki/builds/implementation/2026-05-17-task-100-post-commit-codewiki-gc-active-handoff-.json; .codewiki/validation/2026-05-17-implementation-fail-task-100.json; TASK-100 task; src/application/gc.ts; tests/smoke/hot-retention.test.mjs; src/application/tools/gc.ts; src/adapters/pi/index.ts; src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts; src/application/tools/catalog.ts; src/adapters/pi/tools/session-handoff.ts; src/application/tools/session-handoff.ts; tests/smoke/session-handoff.test.mjs; skills/codewiki*.md; skills/codewiki/references/tool-catalog.md; tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs; tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
codewiki_audit profiles=[alignment,changed,task,stale-reference,file-structure] task_id=TASK-100: warning only for generated graph/task-view files; task/stale-reference/file-structure pass
npm run test:features: pass (19 passed, 0 failed)
Repo runtime dry-run inspection: 10 queued/started codewiki_session_handoff files present; runCodewikiGc dry-run include=[runtime] listed 95 runtime candidates and listed_active=[]
Independent active-handoff temp probe: dry-run listed completed+legacy only; purge deleted completed+legacy only; queued+started survived

Independent archive-proof temp probe: tracked purge without proof blocked with 2 reasons; bad tree blocked; valid archive_sha/tree_sha purged tracked build+pass validation and wrote restore ledger with git restore --source=<archive-sha> commands

issues.summary: Implementation validation uses dirty pre-commit content proof. Task-close/publication still require clean commit/tree/archive or remote proof; current audit warnings about generated state should be resolved or accepted before publication.
Missing required audit evidence for profiles: alignment, changed, task, stale-reference, file-structure.

isolation.notes: Validator used source/build refs and deterministic checks only; builder chat was not used. Working tree dirty, so digest covers checked pre-commit content. This pass is implementation validation only, not task-close/publication readiness.
